history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A shirtless man with visible tattoos takes a mirror selfie while large overlaid text covers the bottom portion of the image.

Main Subject:
A shirtless man with short dark hair appears in a mirror, holding a smartphone with one hand near the left edge of the frame. He has tattoos on his chest and arms, including dark ink designs on the right upper arm and chest, and he faces toward the camera with his head slightly tilted. His facial expression is unclear due to the angle and lighting, but his mouth appears slightly pursed.

Setting:
The setting appears indoors, with a plain wall in the background and a reflective surface used for the selfie. Lighting is dim and uneven, with the subject more brightly lit than the background.

Visual Details:
The man’s skin tone is medium to tan. The overlaid text is large, bold, white with a thick black outline and sits across the bottom half of the image in two lines. The first line reads in uppercase letters, and the second line includes a crying face emoji and a disappointed face emoji. The camera angle is close and slightly tilted, centered on the man’s torso and face.

Visible Text:
ITU MAKSUDNYA
APA COBА😂🤷😒

Practical Summary:
The image shows a shirtless man taking a mirror selfie indoors with tattoos visible on his chest and arms. Large bold text and emojis are overlaid across the bottom of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
